## Issue Reporting

Use the [`mcp-java-dev-tools-issue-report`](../../skills/mcp-java-dev-tools-issue-report/SKILL.md) skill to generate a sanitized issue report from the current session context.

Suggested usage:

`$mcp-java-dev-tools-issue-report, create an issue report for this problem`

Paste the generated output below. Add extra details only if they help reproduction or investigation.

Do not include sensitive code, secrets, bearer tokens, internal hosts, or private enterprise information.
